data.body: DESIGN NOTE (from branch-ref brainstorm, REB-289 follow-up candidate): Option B — automatic ticket→commit provenance. Deferred from the v1 of the 'code-reading ops take a ref arg + pin a SHA' design (v1 = option A: client supplies the ref, default origin/main tip, completion-verify resolves→pins→records→signs the immutable SHA). B would have rebar DERIVE a ticket's actual merge/squash commit automatically — via commit trailers (e.g. 'Ticket: <id>') or a forge/PR query — so the signed completion_verdict pins THIS ticket's exact landing commit rather than a client-supplied or origin/main-tip SHA. Larger effort (new provenance subsystem; depends on a commit-message convention rebar would need to encourage/enforce). Revisit here once v1 lands.
